start: ^Time for you to decode a real message. You got this!
found_frequency: ^I think I got the right frequency.
incorrect_frequency: ^I don't think this is the right frequency.
Unicorn_Start: ^Unicorn magic is powerful, and they use it to encrypt their messages with a color cypher. Luckily, the Wings of the Golden Kingdom have discovered how to decrypt the message using a unicorn horn.

^The horn projects the audio message to text and is able to change the color of each word. Notice the clue word which is unencrypted. Just press W or S to change the color of each word and use A or D to shift the horn between words.
Unicorn_First: ^See, that’s a lot better, keep going and we’ll have this message decrypted in no time!
Unicorn_Hint: ^It seems that word is unencrypted already, so no need to mess with the color!
Unicorn_Solve: ^Oh no! I mean, amazing work, but the message isn't good news. However, now you can interpret, report, and strategize as per usual.
^The dragons and sirens have begun communicating with each other.
^The dragons and sirens are plotting a war strategy together.
^The dragons and sirens are planning a coordinated attack.
Talk: ^We were hoping they wouldn’t be so quick to talk amongst themselves.
^They may be able to share information right now, but if we contain them, we can help prevent the exchange of troops and other resources. We can safely contain one hub, which do you think?
^Send troops to block roads surrounding the unicorn’s forest hub
^Send troops to block roads surrounding the dragon’s mountain hub
^Send troops to block riverways connected to the sirens’ sea hub
Plot: ^With the three of them together, who knows what they could come up with?
^We should utilize this time to pre-emptively strike a sect of enemy forces before they can attack us. Where should we focus our efforts?
^Mobilize troops to the unicorn’s forest hub
^Mobilize troops to the dragon’s mountain hub
^Mobilize troops to the siren’s sea hub
Attack: ^It only stands to reason that they would all choose violence despite it being three against one.
^We should do our best to protect our citizens against such vicious enemies. We likely only have enough time to fortify against one faction. Who seems like the largest threat?
^Prepare our kingdom’s land defenses for unicorn attacks
^Prepare our kingdom’s airborne defenses for dragon attacks
^Prepare our kingdom’s marine defenses for siren attacks
Horn: ^Thanks for your input! I'm going to report to the other officers.
^There is no Gazette out this week, but during decoding I obtained an enemy artifact I can look over.
